_description: Cross-language fixture: input path → expected (slug, hash). Both _lib.py::resolve_state_dir and _lib.sh::oc_compute_slug load and verify against this set. The algorithm: sanitize(basename(realpath(path))) lowercased, [a-z0-9._-] only; sha256(realpath(path))[:16].

_algorithm.sanitize_basename: Lowercase; replace any character not in [a-z0-9._-] with '-'; collapse runs of '-' to single '-'; trim leading/trailing '-'.
_algorithm.hash: sha256 of the realpath bytes (UTF-8), then [:16] hex chars.
